steps.title: Prove the story source
steps.content: The claim is that Aunt Sue's stories come from her personal experiences. The best quotation must identify the source of the stories, not just describe their setting, imagery, or sound.

steps.title: Reject setting and imagery
steps.content: A uses shadow imagery, C gives the setting on summer nights, and D describes how people in the stories mingle with Aunt Sue's voice. The quotation saying the stories came from her own life directly proves personal experience. The answer is B.
